solutionFiles.content:
import sys
sys.path.insert(0, ".")

from models.account import Account

account = Account("Ava", 10)
assert account.deposit(5) == 15
assert account.balance == 15
print("account tests passed")

recipe.solutionCode:
from pathlib import Path
import base64
import runpy

_FILES = {
    'tests/check_account.py': 'aW1wb3J0IHN5cwpzeXMucGF0aC5pbnNlcnQoMCwgIi4iKQoKZnJvbSBtb2RlbHMuYWNjb3VudCBpbXBvcnQgQWNjb3VudAoKYWNjb3VudCA9IEFjY291bnQoIkF2YSIsIDEwKQphc3NlcnQgYWNjb3VudC5kZXBvc2l0KDUpID09IDE1CmFzc2VydCBhY2NvdW50LmJhbGFuY2UgPT0gMTUKcHJpbnQoImFjY291bnQgdGVzdHMgcGFzc2VkIikK',
    'models/account.py': 'Y2xhc3MgQWNjb3VudDoKICAgIGRlZiBfX2luaXRfXyhzZWxmLCBvd25lciwgYmFsYW5jZSk6CiAgICAgICAgc2VsZi5vd25lciA9IG93bmVyCiAgICAgICAgc2VsZi5iYWxhbmNlID0gYmFsYW5jZQoKICAgIGRlZiBkZXBvc2l0KHNlbGYsIGFtb3VudCk6CiAgICAgICAgc2VsZi5iYWxhbmNlICs9IGFtb3VudAogICAgICAgIHJldHVybiBzZWxmLmJhbGFuY2UK',
    'models/__init__.py': '',
    'tests/__init__.py': '',
}

for _path, _data in _FILES.items():
    _file = Path(_path)
    _file.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    _file.write_text(base64.b64decode(_data).decode('utf-8'), encoding='utf-8')

runpy.run_path('tests/check_account.py', run_name="__main__")

solutionFiles.content:
import sys
sys.path.insert(0, ".")

from models.wallet import Wallet

wallet = Wallet(20)
assert wallet.withdraw(25) is False
assert wallet.balance == 20
assert wallet.withdraw(5) is True
assert wallet.balance == 15
print("wallet tests passed")

solutionFiles.content:
import sys
sys.path.insert(0, ".")

from models.savings_goal import SavingsGoal

goal = SavingsGoal("Trip", 200)
assert goal.deposit(50) == 50
assert goal.deposit(-10) == 50
assert goal.percent_complete() == 25
print("goal tests passed")
